spec_match.rationale: Page demonstrates the headline CSS Name-only Container Queries surface (CSS, container-name, container-type); residual gaps in spec vocabulary: background-color.

interactive.rationale: Live UI is real (button, eventListener); controls include "Editorial"; "Technical"; "Minimal" — well past the no-static-card bar.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Feature-index blurb and page H1/lede share the same framing and surface the same API affordances.

edge_cases.rationale: Only the happy path is shown — no error handling, feature detection, or boundary inputs are surfaced.

references.rationale: see-also section links to https://chromestatus.com/feature/5184267522015232 so the cleanup script can recover this folder.

design_system.rationale: Design-system regressions: button rule overrides background without color (.live-widget-btn; .theme-btn).

openQuestions.title: Show the failure modes on style-without-size
openQuestions.detail: Right now the page only demonstrates the happy path. Add at least one of: a feature-detection probe with graceful fallback, an error/throw path (empty input, invalid argument), and a boundary case (zero, max, abort).

openQuestions.title: Bring style-without-size back onto the design system
openQuestions.detail: Design-system regressions: button rule overrides background without color (.live-widget-btn; .theme-btn). See CLAUDE.md rules #5, #6, #7 — CSS variables only, WCAG AA, button background+color always overridden together.

summary: style-without-size for CSS Name-only Container Queries has structural gaps: the rubric flags multiple fails (see open questions). Needs a pass to convert it from a placeholder into a real concept demo.
